headline: Trump Urges Immediate Fed Rate Cut, Adding Macro Pressure to Markets
summary: US President Donald Trump has demanded the Federal Reserve hold a “special meeting” to cut interest rates immediately, calling the current 3.50% to 3.75% target range a threat to national security.While CME FedWatch data shows a 99% probability of rates holding steady at this week’s Federal Reserve meeting, the political ...
